description: Hold-Out-Set — 5 Sites die NIE fuer Prompt-Tuning oder Post-Processing verwendet werden. Hold-Out F1 ist die einzige ehrliche Metrik.

selection_rationale.notion-login: easy, SaaS Auth — baseline login page

rules: NEVER use these sites for prompt tuning
NEVER add site-specific post-processing rules for these sites
NEVER adjust GT for these sites to improve F1
If Hold-Out F1 drops >8pp below Train-Set F1 = overfitting alarm
